mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallet_account (owner_type, owner_id, balance_cents, frozen_cents, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{ownerType}, #{ownerId}, #{balanceCents}, #{frozenCents}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE wallet_account SET balance_cents = #{balanceCents}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
